Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal

Class DefaultRole

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal.AbstractUserManagementItem
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.internal.DefaultRole
All Implemented Interfaces:
Role, TenantSpecificItem, UserManagementItem, Serializable
public class DefaultRole extends AbstractUserManagementItem implements Role
